blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-02-09.
8,594 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
181 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
No questions resolve tomorrow (2026-02-10), but still scan for ones resolving soon (check the resolution_date column in market.csv).

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-08 -> 2026-02-09)

- "What country will be identified as the location of a fatal mass shooting at a secondary school by February 11, 2026?" → Canada
- "Who will be named Egypt’s minister of planning in the cabinet reshuffle by 15 February 2026?" → Ahmed Rostom
- "What country will be named as a source of tensions surrounding the U.S. president's late-February 2026 address?" → Iran
- "What town will authorities identify as the site of a deadly school shooting in Canada by February 11, 2026?" → Tumbler Ridge
- "Which earlier cyclone will humanitarian officials say Gezani's Madagascar landfall likely rivals by February 13, 2026?" → Geralda

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (149 resolved, 181 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
